insights.context: On a weekend Rani was playing cards with her family .The deck has 52 cards.If her brother drew one card .

questions.text: Find the probability of getting a king of red colour.
Find the probability of getting a face card.
Find the probability of getting a jack of hearts.
Find the probability of getting a red  face card.
Find the probability of getting a spade.

insights.context: Rahul and Ravi planned to play Business ( board game) in which they were supposed to use two dice.

questions.text:
Ravi got first chance to roll the dice. What is the probability that he got the 
sum of the two numbers appearing on the top face of the dice is 8?

Rahul got next chance. What is the probability that he got the sum of the two 
numbers appearing on the top face of the dice is 13?

Now it was Ravi’s turn. He rolled the dice. What is the probability that he got 
the sum of the two numbers appearing on the top face of the dice is less than 
or equal to 12 ?

Rahul got next chance. What is the probability that he got the sum of the two 
numbers appearing on the top face of the dice is equal to 7 ?

Now it was Ravi’s turn. He rolled the dice. What is the probability that he got 
the sum of the two numbers appearing on the top face of the dice is greater 
than 8 ?
